name: BambooHR
description: Access employee data, time-off requests, company directory, and HR information from BambooHR through AI chat.
setup_notes:
Requires a BambooHR API key and company subdomain.

Admin setup:
1. Log in to your BambooHR account
2. Click your name in the upper-right corner
3. Select 'API Keys' from the dropdown menu (requires admin permissions)
4. Click 'Add New Key', provide a name (e.g., 'MCP Server'), and click 'Generate Key'
5. Copy the API key immediately (it will not be shown again)
6. Note your company subdomain (the 'yourcompany' part of yourcompany.bamboohr.com)
7. Enter the API key and subdomain in the server configuration

The API key inherits the permissions of the user who created it. Use an admin account for full access to employee data, time-off, and company information.

Note: BambooHR API access may require a specific plan level. Check with your BambooHR account representative if the API Keys option is not visible.

Note: BambooHR does not currently provide an official MCP server.
This uses the community mcp-bamboohr package.
